title: Founding Brand & Growth (listed as 'Growth Generalist')
must_haves: Founding/first marketing hire — build brand from zero
Sharp creative taste, relentless executional drive
Has built things before (communities, brands, products, events, side-hustles)
Fast, high-quality output; generalist range (ghostwriting, case studies, events, agency briefs)
met_strengths: Built Minima brand/positioning from scratch as first employee — exact founding-hire profile
Grew community (100k Discord/Telegram), content engine (blog 30k, YouTube 5k, X 40k), PR to 2m views — proven brand-from-nothing builder
$4.5m presale on $300k budget (15x ROI) demonstrates creative + executional growth craft
AI-agent fluency (Claude Code) matches 'AI operating system' company
Company sponsors visas; Ryan has UK auth anyway
one_line_verdict: Near-ideal fit: role explicitly waives B2B requirement and prizes the exact zero-to-one brand/community/content builder profile Ryan embodies.
fetch_note: Confirmed open via Ashby posting API; role originally advertised as 'Founding Brand & Growth', now titled 'Growth Generalist' on the live Ashby listing (same job, same URL). Full description pulled via API.
